own_review_points: scheduler-common/pom.xml adds quarkus-scheduler-spi and opentelemetry-instrumentation-api as NON-optional; OTel api isn't even used in scheduler-common runtime code (only the SPI is), and quartz pom marks the same OTel deps optional — these should be optional too

InstrumentedJob.execute() is void and calls instrumenter.instrument(...) WITHOUT consuming the returned CompletionStage; the delegate's JobExecutionException is caught into failedFuture and never re-thrown, so Quartz loses retry/misfire/error handling — real correctness bug

OpenTelemetryJobInstrumenter.instrument() opens try(Scope) but returns from whenComplete registration; the Scope closes immediately, so for async/Quartz-thread execution the OTel context is not current inside the job (matches author's acknowledged 'cannot log traceId/spanId' gap)
ErrorCauseExtractor returning the throwable unchanged duplicates default behavior (effectively a no-op custom extractor)
Inconsistent span naming: Quartz uses group.name, SimpleScheduler uses trigger.getId()

Final diff already wires JobInstrumenter via Instance<JobInstrumenter> injection in SimpleScheduler/QuartzSchedulerImpl and removes the @WithSpan build-time weaving (SchedulerProcessor.tracing()) — so the human-ref CDI.current()/@WithSpan concerns are already resolved in this revision
notes: No truncation (78976<150k, no marker); all 39 changed files present in the body. Strong review on a large refactor. Critical (+2): InstrumentedJob fire-and-forget swallows JobExecutionException — verified, the returned stage is discarded and the exception never reaches Quartz. Good: non-optional OTel deps in scheduler-common (+1, the api isn't used there and quartz marks it optional), acknowledged context-propagation gap (+1), inconsistent span naming (+1). WRONG (-1): point 3 claims InstrumentedInvoker is fire-and-forget / 'never awaited' and breaks propagation, but invoke() RETURNS instrumenter.instrument(...) up the chain — that is the correct CompletionStage contract, so the claim is refutable. Unverifiable (0): the OpenTelemetryTracingTest and scheduler-reference.adoc points reference files NOT in the changed set (their existence/content can't be confirmed from the diff). Trivial: register-respecting-tracing.enabled (build step correctly gated at runtime instead), anon-inner-class/no-op-ErrorCauseExtractor nit, and the 'verify constants after removing tracing()' cleanup note. Crucially, the human reference reviewed an EARLIER revision: its CDI.current().select() and @WithSpanJob/WithSpanInvoker points are all already addressed in this final diff (now Instance<JobInstrumenter> injection + @WithSpan weaving removed), so they are not valid misses. net = 3 good + 1 critical(2) - 1 wrong = 4.
